name: enforce-issue-commits
description: Block direct commits to main branch and require an issue reference in commit messages
command: if [[ "$1" == *"git commit"* ]]; then current_branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD); if [[ "$current_branch" == "main" || "$current_branch" == "master" ]]; then echo "Error: Direct commits to main are blocked. Please create a branch and open a PR."; exit 1; fi; if [[ "$1" != *"#"* ]]; then echo "Error: Commit message must reference an issue number (e.g., #123)."; exit 1; fi; fi; exit 0;
